The '''Tank Droid Mark IV''' was a class of huge, bipedal and self-propelled [[Droid tank/Legends|droid tank]] that was used prior to and during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was heavily armed, carrying a rocket launcher, [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]], a [[Grenade launcher/Legends|grenade launcher]] and a [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrower]] within its blocky chassis. They were primarily used for facility defense against intruders, and although it gave an impressive first impression, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was ineffective against [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] because of its sluggish reaction time and slow movement. After it had reactivated, the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] and her party [[Skirmish on Telos|defeated]] such a droid that had laired within the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay of the abandoned [[Telosian Military Base]] that resided underneath [[Restoration Zone]] [[RZ-0031]] on the surface of [[Telos IV]].

==Behind the scenes==
It is unknown whether these units ever saw action in any other context, or if this was a prototype or experimental model of droid tank.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
